steps.title: Identify the y-intercept location
steps.content:
The y-intercept is where the graph crosses the y-axis, which occurs when x = 0. Substitute x = 0 into $y = 14^x$:

$$y = 14^0$$

steps.title: Evaluate 14 to the power 0
steps.content:
Any positive number raised to the power 0 equals 1:

$$y = 1$$

The y-intercept is the point $(0, 1)$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
